name: PocketBase
description: Open Source backend in 1 file with embedded SQLite database, real-time subscriptions, and a beautiful Admin dashboard.

aws.parity: The single PocketBase binary runs the same locally and on Fargate — identical REST API, auth and admin UI.
aws.deploy: Run the image as a Fargate service with an EFS volume mounted at /pb_data so the SQLite store persists.

variables.label: API and Admin Panel Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind both the PocketBase API and the visual Admin Dashboard.
